# Health Check Ai MCP

> MEOK AI Labs — HTTP endpoint health monitoring and status checking

`health-check-ai-mcp` is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server by MEOK AI Labs.

## Install

```bash
pip install health-check-ai-mcp
```

Or run without installing:

```bash
uvx health-check-ai-mcp
```

## Tools

- `check_endpoint` — Check if a URL endpoint is responding. Returns status code, latency, headers, and health assessment.
- `batch_check` — Check multiple URLs (comma-separated). Returns status for each with summary statistics.
- `get_uptime_report` — Get uptime report for a monitored URL based on check history, including availability and latency trends.
- `configure_monitor` — Configure a URL monitor with thresholds for alerting and tracking.

## Links

- Source: https://github.com/CSOAI-ORG/health-check-ai-mcp
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/health-check-ai-mcp/
- MEOK AI Labs: https://meok.ai
- Council of AI: https://councilof.ai
